description: Copy dataproviders package from BA2TradePlatform and verify structure
steps: Copy the dataproviders directory to the project backend folder
Verify all API-based providers are present (Alpha Vantage, Yahoo Finance, Polygon.io, EODHD)
Verify AI providers are excluded from the copied package
Check that all necessary __init__.py files are present

description: Refactor dataproviders into standalone reusable package
steps: Create a consistent API interface across all providers
Add proper error handling and logging to each provider
Verify package can be imported independently

description: Configure .env file with API keys for data providers
Initialize FastAPI backend with basic project structure
steps: Create requirements.txt with FastAPI, uvicorn, and core dependencies
Create main.py with basic FastAPI app
Test server starts successfully with uvicorn

description: Initialize React frontend with TypeScript and Vite
steps: Run npm create vite@latest with React + TypeScript template

description: Set up SQLite database with initial schema
steps: Define SQLAlchemy models for datasets table
Define SQLAlchemy models for optimization_jobs table
Define SQLAlchemy models for models table
Define SQLAlchemy models for backtests table
Define SQLAlchemy models for optimization_profiles table
Define SQLAlchemy models for api_keys table
Run database migration to create all tables

description: Set up database-backed task queue (replaces Celery/Redis)
steps: Create TaskQueue SQLAlchemy model with status, priority, progress tracking
Create TaskQueueService with worker thread pool
Implement task queuing, claiming, and processing logic
Add retry logic with configurable max_retries and delay
Create REST API endpoints for task management
Initialize task queue on application startup
Test task creation and status retrieval

description: Alpha Vantage provider fetches 1 year historical OHLC data
steps: Configure Alpha Vantage API key in .env
Call fetch method with ticker='AAPL' and timeframe='1d'
Specify date range for 1 year of data
Verify data covers approximately 252 trading days
Check for no missing critical data

description: Yahoo Finance provider fetches 1 year historical OHLC data
steps: Call fetch method with ticker='MSFT' and timeframe='1d'
Specify date range for 1 year of data
Verify data covers approximately 252 trading days
Check for no missing critical data

description: Polygon.io provider fetches 1 year historical OHLC data
steps: Call fetch method with ticker='GOOGL' and timeframe='1d'
Specify date range for 1 year of data
Verify data covers approximately 252 trading days
Check for no missing critical data

description: EODHD provider fetches 1 year historical OHLC data
steps: Call fetch method with ticker='TSLA' and timeframe='1d'
Specify date range for 1 year of data
Verify data covers approximately 252 trading days
Check for no missing critical data

description: Data provider supports multiple timeframes (1h, 4h, D1)
steps: Fetch data with timeframe='1h' for 1 month
Fetch data with timeframe='4h' for 3 months
Fetch data with timeframe='1d' for 1 year

description: Create dataset API endpoint returns dataset with metadata
steps: Send POST request to /api/datasets with ticker='AAPL'
Include timeframe='1d' and date range in request
Verify response contains metadata (rows_count, date range)
Verify dataset is saved to database
Verify dataset file is created on disk

description: List datasets API endpoint returns all created datasets
steps: Verify each dataset has ID, name, ticker, timeframe
Verify date range and row count are included

description: Get dataset details API endpoint returns full dataset info
steps: Note the dataset ID from response
Verify response contains all dataset fields

description: Delete dataset API endpoint removes dataset and files
steps: Note the dataset ID and file path
Verify dataset is removed from database
Verify dataset file is deleted from disk

description: Calculate SMA technical indicator for dataset
steps: Fetch OHLC data for a ticker
Verify SMA column is added to dataset
Verify SMA values are correct (rolling average)
Check first 19 rows have NaN for SMA

description: Calculate EMA technical indicator for dataset
steps: Fetch OHLC data for a ticker
Verify EMA column is added to dataset
Verify EMA values are correct (exponential average)
Compare EMA with SMA to verify different values

description: Calculate RSI technical indicator for dataset
steps: Fetch OHLC data for a ticker
Verify RSI column is added to dataset
Verify RSI values are between 0 and 100
Check for reasonable RSI values on known data

description: Calculate MACD technical indicator for dataset
steps: Fetch OHLC data for a ticker
Configure MACD with fast=12, slow=26, signal=9
Verify MACD line column is added
Verify MACD signal line column is added
Verify MACD histogram column is added

description: Calculate Bollinger Bands technical indicator for dataset
steps: Fetch OHLC data for a ticker
Configure Bollinger Bands with period=20, std=2
Calculate Bollinger Bands on close prices
Verify upper band column is added
Verify middle band (SMA) column is added
Verify lower band column is added
Check upper band > middle band > lower band

description: Calculate ATR technical indicator for dataset
steps: Fetch OHLC data for a ticker
Calculate ATR using high, low, close prices
Verify ATR column is added to dataset

description: Calculate Stochastic oscillator for dataset
steps: Fetch OHLC data for a ticker
Calculate Stochastic using high, low, close

description: Calculate multi-timeframe technical indicators (15m, 1h, 4h, D1)
steps: Fetch hourly OHLC data for a ticker
Calculate SMA on daily resampled data
Verify all timeframe columns are added with proper naming
Verify higher timeframe values align correctly

description: Fetch fundamental data (FCF, P/E, EPS, Revenue) for ticker
steps: Configure data provider with fundamentals support
Verify FCF (Free Cash Flow) is returned
Verify EPS (Earnings Per Share) is returned
Check data has proper date/period information

description: Create fundamental features: days_to_last_FCF
steps: Fetch fundamental FCF data with quarterly values
For each row in OHLC dataset, calculate days since last FCF event
Verify column contains positive integer values
Verify values increase until next FCF event
Verify values reset after new FCF data point

description: Create fundamental features: last_FCF value
steps: Fetch fundamental FCF data with quarterly values
For each row in OHLC dataset, get the most recent FCF value
Verify column contains the actual FCF values
Verify value remains constant until next FCF event
Verify value updates when new FCF data is available

description: Create fundamental features: last_FCF_percent change
steps: Fetch fundamental FCF data with quarterly values
Calculate percentage change between last and previous FCF
Verify column contains percentage change values

description: Create fundamental features: days_to_next_FCF
steps: Fetch fundamental FCF data with quarterly values
For each row, calculate days until next FCF event
Verify values decrease as event approaches
Verify values are reasonable (e.g., 0-90 days for quarterly)

description: Create fundamental features: next_FCF_forecast
steps: Fetch fundamental FCF data with quarterly values
For each row, get forecast for next FCF value
Verify column contains projected FCF values
Verify forecasts are reasonable based on trends

description: Fetch macro economic data (interest rates, GDP, inflation)
steps: Configure data provider with macro data support
Fetch interest rate data for date range
Fetch GDP data for date range
Fetch inflation (CPI) data for date range
Verify all macro indicators are returned
Check data has proper date information

description: Integrate macro data with OHLC dataset using forward-fill
steps: Fetch OHLC daily data for 1 year
Merge macro data with OHLC dataset
Forward-fill macro values for dates without updates
Verify macro columns are added to dataset
Verify no missing values in macro columns

description: Set up Transformers library with financial sentiment model
steps: Test sentiment analysis on sample financial text
Verify model returns sentiment label and confidence
Verify labels include Positive, Neutral, Negative

description: Fetch news articles for a ticker in date range
steps: Fetch news for ticker='AAPL' for past 6 months
Verify articles are returned with dates
Verify articles have title and content
Check articles are relevant to the ticker

description: Run sentiment analysis on news articles
steps: Fetch news articles for a ticker
For each article, run sentiment analysis

description: Create sentiment feature: news_1d_positive_short
steps: For each row in dataset, count positive short-term news in past 1 day
Verify counts are accurate for sample dates

description: Create sentiment feature: news_1w_negative_long
steps: For each row in dataset, count negative long-term news in past 1 week
Verify counts are accurate for sample dates

description: Create all sentiment features (1d, 1w, 1m, 6m combinations)
steps: Create features for all time periods: 1d, 1w, 1m, 6m
Create features for all sentiment types: Positive, Neutral, Negative
Create features for all impact timeframes: Short, Medium, Long
Verify 36 sentiment columns are added (4 periods Ã— 3 sentiments Ã— 3 impacts)
Verify all columns contain valid count values

description: Export dataset to CSV format
steps: Create a dataset with OHLC and indicators
Open CSV and verify headers are present
Verify data rows are correctly formatted

description: Export dataset to Parquet format
steps: Create a dataset with OHLC and indicators
Read Parquet file and verify schema
Verify file size is smaller than CSV

description: Dataset preview API returns sample data for visualization
steps: Verify response contains sample rows (e.g., first 100 and last 100)
Verify data is suitable for charting

description: Dataset statistics API returns comprehensive stats
steps: Create a dataset with various features
Verify response contains total row count
Verify response contains missing data percentage per column
Verify response contains basic statistics (mean, std, min, max)

description: Configure PyTorch with CUDA for GPU acceleration
steps: Write test script to check torch.cuda.is_available()

description: Install and configure Darts library for timeseries models
steps: Import darts and verify no errors
Verify all model classes are available

description: Create LSTM model architecture with Darts
steps: Verify model is created without errors

description: Create N-BEATS model architecture with Darts
steps: Verify model is created without errors

description: Create RNN model architecture with Darts
steps: Verify model is created without errors

description: Calculate prediction target: price_up_10pct_5dd_7d
steps: For each row, look forward 7 days
Check if price goes up 10% with max 5% drawdown
Set target to 1 if condition met, 0 otherwise
Verify column contains binary values (0 or 1)

description: Calculate prediction target: price_down_10pct_5dd_7d
steps: For each row, look forward 7 days
Check if price goes down 10% with max 5% drawdown
Set target to 1 if condition met, 0 otherwise
Verify column contains binary values (0 or 1)

description: Calculate prediction target: price_up_20pct_10dd_30d
steps: For each row, look forward 30 days
Check if price goes up 20% with max 10% drawdown
Set target to 1 if condition met, 0 otherwise
Verify column contains binary values (0 or 1)

description: Calculate prediction target: price_down_20pct_10dd_30d
steps: For each row, look forward 30 days
Check if price goes down 20% with max 10% drawdown
Set target to 1 if condition met, 0 otherwise
Verify column contains binary values (0 or 1)

description: Verify prediction target symmetry constraint
steps: Define output targets with up scenarios: 10%/5%/7d, 20%/10%/30d
Automatically generate down targets with same parameters
Verify both up and down columns exist
Verify columns are balanced (same number of up and down)
Check that UI prevents asymmetric target definitions

description: Split dataset into train and test sets with configurable ratio
steps: Load dataset with 1 year of data
Verify train set contains 80% of rows
Verify test set contains 20% of rows
Verify no overlap between train and test

description: Train LSTM model on dataset with prediction targets
steps: Prepare dataset with features and targets
Split into train and test sets
Train model on train set for 10 epochs
Verify training loss decreases over epochs
Calculate validation loss on test set

description: Evaluate trained model on test set
steps: Train a model on train set
Verify all metrics are within expected ranges

description: Save trained model to disk as PyTorch checkpoint
steps: Save model weights and architecture to file

description: Install and configure DEAP genetic algorithm library
Define chromosome encoding for model hyperparameters
steps: Create gene for number of layers (range 1-5)
Create gene for activation function (choices: relu, tanh, sigmoid)
Verify chromosome can be decoded back to hyperparameters

description: Implement fitness function for model evaluation
steps: Define fitness function that takes chromosome
Return validation accuracy as fitness score
Verify fitness function runs without errors

description: Implement crossover operator for genetic algorithm
steps: Define crossover function for two parent chromosomes
Verify offspring inherit genes from both parents
Test crossover maintains valid gene ranges

description: Implement mutation operator for genetic algorithm
steps: Implement random gene mutation with probability
Verify mutated genes stay within valid ranges

description: Run genetic algorithm optimization for 5 generations
steps: Verify best fitness improves over generations

description: Implement early stopping for genetic optimization
steps: Check if fitness hasn't improved for N generations
Trigger early stopping when convergence detected
Return best model found so far
Verify optimization stops before max generations if converged

description: Implement walk-forward optimization

For each period, optimize on in-sample data

steps: Verify no flash of unstyled content
Verify animations are subtle and professional

description: WebSocket connection establishes for live updates
steps: Open browser developer tools, Network tab
Verify messages are received with progress updates
Verify connection stays alive during training

description: Handle WebSocket disconnection and reconnection
steps: Start an optimization job with live updates

description: Comprehensive error handling for API failures
steps: Try to create a dataset via UI
Verify error message: 'Cannot connect to server'
Verify specific validation error message is shown
Verify UI remains usable after errors

description: Form validation prevents invalid submissions
steps: Set start date after end date
Verify error: 'Start date must be before end date'

description: Secure API key storage with encryption
steps: Verify API key is not stored in plaintext
Verify backend can decrypt and use key

description: GPU memory management prevents OOM errors
steps: Start multiple optimization jobs with large models
Verify GPU memory is allocated efficiently
Verify GPU memory is freed after job completes
Verify jobs queue if GPU memory is full

description: Job creation form supports selecting multiple datasets
steps: Verify dataset selection allows multiple selections
Verify all selected datasets are shown in summary
Verify selected datasets can be removed individually

description: Multi-dataset API endpoint validates dataset compatibility
steps: Create two datasets with same columns and timeframe
Create one dataset with different columns
Send POST to /api/jobs with compatible datasets
Verify request succeeds for compatible datasets
Send POST to /api/jobs with incompatible datasets

description: Multi-dataset training combines data chronologically
steps: Create datasets for AAPL (2023) and AAPL (2024)
Select both datasets in job creation
Verify combined dataset is sorted by date
Verify total rows equals sum of both datasets

description: Multi-dataset training handles different tickers
steps: Create datasets for AAPL and MSFT with same timeframe
Select both datasets in job creation
Verify ticker column is added to distinguish data
Verify model receives data from both tickers
Verify model performance metrics shown per ticker

description: Multi-dataset preview shows combined statistics
steps: Select multiple datasets in job creation form
Verify total row count is sum of all datasets
Verify date range spans all datasets
Verify warnings for missing columns in any dataset

description: Dataset compatibility check for timeframe matching
steps: Attempt to select both in job creation
Verify option to resample to common timeframe
Verify resample preview shows expected row counts

description: Multi-dataset job stores source dataset references
steps: Submit job and note job ID
Verify response contains array of dataset IDs
Verify each dataset ID is valid
Verify dataset names are included in job details

description: Training with multiple datasets uses cross-validation
steps: Verify each dataset is used as hold-out in turn
Verify aggregate metrics across all folds

description: Multi-dataset job progress shows per-dataset status
steps: Verify progress bar shows overall completion
Verify each dataset shows individual status
Verify current dataset being processed is highlighted

description: Saved job configuration includes multi-dataset settings
steps: Create job with multiple datasets selected
Verify all dataset selections are restored
Verify other job settings are also restored

description: Settings page has worker configuration section
steps: Verify list of configured workers is shown
Verify local worker is shown by default
Verify status indicator for each worker (online/offline/busy)

description: Add new remote worker configuration
steps: Verify new worker appears in list

description: Edit existing worker configuration
steps: Click edit button on existing worker

description: Delete worker configuration
steps: Click delete button on a remote worker
Verify worker is removed from list
Verify cannot delete the local worker

description: Enable and disable workers
steps: Click disable toggle on an enabled worker
Verify disabled worker is not used for new jobs

description: Worker health check shows connection status
steps: Configure a worker with valid URL
Configure a worker with invalid URL
Verify last heartbeat timestamp is shown
Click refresh button to re-check health

description: Worker displays GPU and CPU information
steps: Verify GPU info is shown (name, memory, count)
Verify active jobs count is shown

description: Local worker runs on backend host
steps: Verify local worker is automatically configured
Verify local worker shows correct GPU info
Verify local worker can process training jobs
Verify local worker URL is localhost

description: Worker configuration persists in database
steps: Verify all worker configs are restored

description: Export and import worker configurations
User can define custom increment steps for optimization parameters
steps: Verify each numeric parameter has a 'Step' input field
Set layer size step to 16 (instead of default 8)
Set learning rate step to 0.001 (instead of default 0.0001)
Verify step values are validated (must be positive)
Verify estimated combinations count updates based on steps
Submit form and verify steps are saved with job configuration

description: Configure Python logging with separate log files for debug, info, and error levels
steps: Create logging configuration module in backend
Configure debug.log handler for DEBUG level messages
Configure info.log handler for INFO level messages
Configure error.log handler for ERROR level messages
Add log format with timestamp, level, module, and message
Configure log rotation for production use
Ensure all modules use logging instead of print statements
Test logging works across all backend modules

description: Create abstraction layer for genetic optimization libraries
steps: Define common methods: initialize, evolve, get_best, etc.
Create adapter pattern for each library
Support library selection in job configuration
Persist library choice in optimization profiles

description: Install and configure shinkaEvolve evolutionary library
steps: Create shinkaEvolve adapter implementing GeneticOptimizer interface

description: Add genetic library selector in optimization job UI
steps: Add dropdown to select genetic library (DEAP, PyGAD, shinkaEvolve)
Display current library in job list and details
